description: This file implements the Bootstrap ScrollSpy component, which tracks scrolling and updates navigation links accordingly. It defines the ScrollSpy class, handles event binding, intersection observation, and provides a jQuery plugin interface.

classes.name: ScrollSpy
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that manages scrollspy behavior, observing sections, updating active links, and handling smooth scrolling.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Reinitializes target and section observables, and sets up intersection observers.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disconnects the intersection observer and cleans up.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Processes and merges configuration options, handling deprecated and backward compatibility options.

methods.name: _maybeEnableSmoothScroll
methods.description: Enables smooth scrolling behavior if configured, binding click events to scroll smoothly.

methods.name: _getNewObserver
methods.description: Creates and returns a new IntersectionObserver with current configuration.

methods.name: _observerCallback
methods.description: Callback for intersection observer; updates active link based on visible sections.

methods.name: _initializeTargetsAndObservables
methods.description: Finds target links and observable sections, storing references for observation.

methods.name: _process
methods.description: Activates a target link and updates UI accordingly.

methods.name: _activateParents
methods.description: Activates parent elements like dropdowns and list items related to the target.

methods.name: _clearActiveClass
methods.description: Removes active class from parent elements and links.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Static method to enable jQuery plugin interface for ScrollSpy.
